parameters.query:
WITH top_opps AS (
  SELECT o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.dept, o.gda_score, o.gda_label, o.estimated_value,
    o.response_deadline, o.stage, o.set_aside, o.naics_code, o.source_url,
    CASE WHEN cp.opp_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_capture_plan,
    cp.plan_data->>'capture_readiness' as capture_readiness,
    (cp.plan_data->>'recommended_pwin')::int as recommended_pwin,
    CASE WHEN o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL THEN (o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) ELSE NULL END as days_to_deadline
  FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
  LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
  WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE', 'EVALUATE')
  AND NOT (
    cp.opp_id IS NULL
    AND o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL
    AND o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE < 30
  )
  ORDER BY CASE o.gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, o.gda_score DESC
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT * FROM top_opps;

DO $$ BEGIN
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_risk_register (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    risk_key VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    severity VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    category VARCHAR(50),
    owner VARCHAR(100),
    opp_id INTEGER,
    agency VARCHAR(255),
    description TEXT,
    mitigation TEXT,
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    due_date DATE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    auto_generated BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'auto-risk-cron'
  );
EXCEPTION WHEN others THEN NULL;
END $$;
SELECT r.title, r.severity, r.category, r.opp_id, r.mitigation, r.due_date
FROM gda_risk_register r
WHERE r.status = 'OPEN'
ORDER BY CASE r.severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM gda_action_items WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';
INSERT INTO gda_action_items (item, owner, deadline, status, source_meeting, created_at)
SELECT
  (elem->>'_db_item')::varchar(1000),
  'GDA AI',
  (elem->>'_db_deadline')::date,
  'Open',
  'gda-daily-actions',
  NOW()
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json._rows || []) }}'::jsonb) AS elem
WHERE (elem->>'_db_item') IS NOT NULL;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({actions: $input.all().map(i => i.json), action_count: $input.all().length, generated_at: new Date().toISOString()}) }}

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_dashboard_intel_cache (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  cache_key VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  cache_date DATE NOT NULL,
  opps_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  actions JSONB NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT,
  action_count INT,
  generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
);
SELECT id, actions, summary, action_count, generated_at
FROM gda_dashboard_intel_cache
WHERE cache_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND opps_hash = md5((
    SELECT string_agg(id::text, ',' ORDER BY
      CASE gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, gda_score DESC
    )
    FROM (
      SELECT o.id, o.gda_score, o.gda_label
      FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
      WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
      AND NOT (
        cp2.opp_id IS NULL
        AND o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL
        AND o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE < 30
      )
      ORDER BY CASE o.gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, o.gda_score DESC
      LIMIT 15
    ) sub
  ))
  AND expires_at > NOW()
LIMIT 1;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({actions: $json.actions, summary: $json.summary, action_count: $json.action_count, generated_at: $json.generated_at, cached: true}) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gda_dashboard_intel_cache (cache_key, cache_date, opps_hash, actions, summary, action_count, generated_at, expires_at)
VALUES (
  md5(CURRENT_DATE::text || '_' || (
    SELECT md5(string_agg(id::text, ',' ORDER BY
      CASE gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, gda_score DESC
    ))
    FROM (
      SELECT o.id, o.gda_score, o.gda_label
      FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
      WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
      AND NOT (
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_capture_plans cp2 WHERE cp2.opp_id = o.id) = 0
        AND o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL
        AND o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE < 30
      )
      ORDER BY CASE o.gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, o.gda_score DESC
      LIMIT 15
    ) sub
  )),
  CURRENT_DATE,
  (
    SELECT md5(string_agg(id::text, ',' ORDER BY
      CASE gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, gda_score DESC
    ))
    FROM (
      SELECT o.id, o.gda_score, o.gda_label
      FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
      WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
      ORDER BY CASE o.gda_label WHEN 'PURSUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'EVALUATE' THEN 2 END, o.gda_score DESC
      LIMIT 15
    ) sub
  ),
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.actions) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.action_count || 0 }},
  NOW(),
  NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
)
ON CONFLICT (cache_key) DO UPDATE
  SET actions = EXCLUDED.actions,
      summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
      action_count = EXCLUDED.action_count,
      generated_at = EXCLUDED.generated_at,
      expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at;

SELECT
  o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.estimated_value,
  o.response_deadline,
  (o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) as days_out,
  CASE
    WHEN (o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 3 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN (o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 7 THEN 'URGENT'
    ELSE 'HIGH'
  END as pressure,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' as gate_stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' as gate_review_date,
  CASE
    WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL
    AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date < CURRENT_DATE THEN true
    ELSE false
  END as gate_overdue
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
  AND (
    (o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND o.response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 14)
    OR (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date < CURRENT_DATE)
  )
ORDER BY o.response_deadline ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;
